title: M&T Bank Hasn't Seen The Price Growth It Deserves
text: M&T Bank recorded strong Q3'23 revenues and net income, driven by increased operational cash flow. The bank's customer-focused strategy and prudent risk management make it a 'buy' rating. M&T Bank has outperformed its peers in terms of stock performance and maintains a superior balance sheet position.

title: M&T Bank Corporation Announces Fourth Quarter & Full-Year 2023 Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: BUFFALO, N.Y. , Dec. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank Corporation ("M&T") (NYSE:MTB) plans to announce its fourth quarter and full-year 2023 earnings results in a press release that will be issued before the market opens on Thursday, January 18, 2024.

title: M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) Soars 4.7%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
text: M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
